title: RPG Character Sheet System Contract
description: Validation schema for all game system schemas produced by the Game Rule Research Agent. Every {system}.schema.json must validate against this template before handoff to the Designer or Code Writer Agent.

systemId.$comment: Machine-friendly identifier. Lowercase, hyphens only. Used in file paths, routes, and CSS class names.

systemName.$comment: Human-readable display name shown in the UI.

version.$comment: Schema version in semver format. Increment on any breaking change to field ids or types.

creationSteps.$comment: Ordered list of steps in the character creation wizard. Each step maps to one screen in the stepper UI.

stepId.$comment: Unique identifier for this step. Used in routing and test selectors.

label.$comment: Display label shown in the wizard progress bar.

description.$comment: Optional flavour text shown at the top of the step. Can include game-specific context.

fields.$comment: Ordered list of fields on this step. Order determines render order in the UI.

sheetSections.$comment: Defines how fields are grouped in the Full Sheet View (as opposed to the creation wizard). Order determines section render order.

sectionId.$comment: Unique identifier for this sheet section.

label.$comment: Section heading shown on the full sheet.

fieldIds.$comment: References to field ids defined in creationSteps. All ids must resolve. A field can appear in one section only.

hidden.$comment: If true, this section is hidden from the default sheet view and requires explicit user action to reveal (e.g. Paranoia secret page). Default: false.

specialRules.$comment: Named special mechanics that require custom UI behaviour beyond the standard field types. The Code Writer Agent must handle each named rule explicitly.
Add new values to the enum here when new special mechanics are identified.

theme.$comment: Visual identity overrides for this system. Maps to the Tailwind theme extension at /src/themes/{systemId}.ts.

accentColor.$comment: Primary accent hex colour for this system. Used for interactive elements, borders, highlights.

accentColorMuted.$comment: Optional softer variant of the accent for backgrounds, badges. Derived from accentColor if omitted.

flavorClass.$comment: Tailwind theme name defined in /src/themes/{systemId}.ts. Applied as a CSS class on the root sheet element to scope system-specific styles.

dieType.$comment: Which die SVG to use for the dice roller icon on this system's sheets.

field.$comment: A single input field within a creation step. The type property determines which other properties are required.

id.$comment: Unique identifier for this field across the entire schema. Used in dependsOn references, test selectors, and character data keys.

label.$comment: Display label shown next to the field in the UI.

type.$comment: Field render type. Determines which component renders this field and which additional properties apply.

rollFormula.$comment: Dice formula string. Required when type is 'roll'. Uses dice notation: NdS[kh/kl N][+/-N]. Examples: '3d6', '4d6kh3', '1d6+2'.

options.$comment: List of options for dropdown fields. Required when type is 'dropdown'. Each option has a value (stored in character data) and a label (shown in UI).

description.$comment: Optional tooltip or flavour text shown when option is hovered or selected.

dependsOn.$comment: List of field ids whose values this field's value derives from. All ids must reference fields defined earlier in the schema (forward references not allowed). Required when type is 'calculated'.

derivation.$comment: Name of the TypeScript function in creation-rules.ts that computes this field's value from its dependsOn fields. Required when type is 'calculated'. Must exactly match an exported function name.

pool.$comment: Total points available for allocation. Required when type is 'pointAlloc'.

minValue.$comment: Minimum allowed value. Applies to roll, calculated, and pointAlloc fields.

maxValue.$comment: Maximum allowed value. Applies to roll, calculated, and pointAlloc fields.

defaultValue.$comment: Optional default value pre-filled in the field before user interaction.

placeholder.$comment: Placeholder text for text and textarea fields.

notes.$comment: Rule clarifications, edge cases, or implementation notes for the Code Writer Agent. Not shown in UI.

group.$comment: Optional grouping label for visual clustering within a step (e.g. 'Physical Attributes', 'Mental Attributes'). Fields with the same group value are rendered together.

allOf.$comment: calculated type: derivation and dependsOn are required
